menu_about_blurb: Recovered Factory is a newsletter by David Eads and Tory Lysik with field notes and public experiments from our data journalism practice.
hero_subtitle: Dispatches, field notes, and experiments from David Eads and Tory Lysik.
subscribe_title: Sign up for new work in your inbox.
subscribe_success: Success! Now check your email to confirm your subscription.
subscribe_confirmed: You're confirmed. Thanks for signing up.
subscribe_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
post_subscribe_heading: Sign up for dispatches from our public workshop
support_subtitle: Choose a monthly level or name your price.
support_prompt: Finding this useful? Support our work.
support_perk_monthly_12: Includes: Free t-shirt after 3 months, monthly video calls, and more perks to be announced soon.
support_perk_monthly_75: Includes: Free t-shirt, monthly video calls, 2 hours of free consulting with David and Tory per quarter, and more perks to be announced soon.
support_perk_once: Includes: Monthly video calls and other perks to be determined. Supporters will help us decide what to do!
